docs.title: MyBookTools
docs.text: MyBookTools is a PowerShell module designed to audit, organize, refine, and maintain large external drives.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Fast audits
  • Hash caching
  • Categorization
  • Duplicate resolution
  • Cleanup
  • Visual maps
  • Maintenance automation
  • GUI wrapper

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
• Full MyBookTools v2 module
  • Auto-loaded CategoryMap with disable toggle
  • Fast audit subsystem
  • Hash caching subsystem
  • Categorization subsystem
  • Duplicate resolution subsystem
  • Cleanup subsystem
  • Visual map subsystem
  • Real-time status subsystem
  • Maintenance scheduler
  • GUI wrapper (WPF)
  • Benchmark script
  • Pester test suite
  • GitHub Actions CI workflow
  • Module manifest
  • Profile auto-import snippet

docs.title: Changed
docs.text:
• Improved performance for large drives (3 TB+)
  • Streamlined logging and status reporting

docs.title: Invoke-MyBookCategorize
docs.text: Categorizes files using the default or custom CategoryMap.

docs.title: Invoke-MyBookCleanup
docs.text: Removes empty directories, reports duplicates, compresses archives.

docs.title: Register-MyBookMaintenanceTask
docs.text: Creates a scheduled task for daily maintenance.
